reviews.review_description: I love Edgar Allen Poe's work and appreciate literature so I liked this app. Nicely done!
This has always been one of my favorite sorry stories and to have that kind of atmosphere while reading Gabe me goosebumps. I keeled looking over my shoulder, I felt like I was being watched.
The developers have made a very clever vr experience.  I hope they will finish it off with full voice reading, sound effects (scraping, the raven) and a climactic ending.

This was an amazing experience simply based on reading. I truly hope that the creators of this app develops a VR reading app with multiple environments. So far I've tried 3 & all were horrible. They didn't allow pdf files. Another just didn't work and induced nausea. Or the environments didn't set the mood. I like dark Anne Rice stories. It would be awesome to read this in a dark den fireplace environment. I also like romance it would nice to read in a park with a day or night setting. I love fantasy like LOTR and Harry Potter. It would be amazing to read in a magical environment. 

If you create this immersive experience PLEASE CONTACT ME. So I can try it first!
I💖loved the Raven.But it needs more interaction  and more effects.💖

reviews.review_title: Looks great, doesn't do a lot
reviews.review_description: You just sit in a virtual room by a fireplace, and turn the pages of a book.  A Raven flies in the window and lands in the room.  Worth checking out just once.
Great app!  Please make more (for other poems and books).  If others agree, please share that sentiment!
Expected the ghost lady outside the doors to enter the room�
